data.title: [Cleanup] Delete dead FractalObject.tsx (stale palette + Political Club visible + iOS-scroll regression handlers)

data.to:
**[CRITICAL CLEANUP — blocks FRAC-23]**

`src/components/three/FractalObject.tsx` is dead code with three traps. From FRAC-21 audit §H4.

## Why it's dead
- `src/components/three/FractalCityScene.tsx:9` imports `FractalObject` from **`./OctahedronHero`**, not from `./FractalObject`
- Grep confirms zero live imports of `src/components/three/FractalObject` anywhere in `src/`
- The standalone file ships the old "Fractal Bright" palette (`#E07A5F`, `#8B7355`, `#457B9D`, `#1D3557`, `#CC2936`, `#6B4C9A`) — disagrees with the live hero
- Includes a visible Political Club nav node — contradicts FRAC-161
- Uses the old `onClick` handlers that caused the iOS-scroll regression OctahedronHero was rewritten to fix
- Two files export a component literally named `FractalObject` — name collision

## Action

Delete `src/components/three/FractalObject.tsx` entirely. Verify nothing breaks:
- `pnpm build` succeeds
- `pnpm test` passes
- Visual smoke: home + each house page renders identically
- Confirm `FractalCityScene.tsx:7` commented-out import is also removed (or left as a comment with a one-line note pointing at the deletion commit)

## Acceptance criteria

- File deleted
- Build succeeds, tests pass
- No remaining references to the standalone FractalObject in `src/`
- No visible visual difference

## Blocks
FRAC-23

## Cites
FRAC-21 synthesis §H4

data.body: Review (orchestrator, fresh context): diff verified — 2 files changed, 328 deletions, only FractalObject.tsx + the dangling FractalCityScene.tsx:7 comment. Build passes (3.59s, 2775 modules). 4 pre-existing test failures verified on clean master (footer.test x2, navigation.test, neighborhood.test) — none reference FractalObject; unrelated. Acceptance criteria met. Branch frac-25-delete-fractalobject in worktree, ready for batched PR with other cleanups.
